narrative:
Rushcreek Twp township has 1,453 registered voters, with 50.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.9 percentage points.
